step_name_subtitle: Choose a name for the new database
step_sql_subtitle: Optional: paste a script or upload a .sql file
step_done_subtitle: All done. The new database is now available in the list.
step_error_subtitle: Failed to create the database. All changes have been rolled back.
field_technical_name_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and '_' only. Starts with a letter. E.g.: northwind, shop_db
field_display_name_hint: Cosmetic label in the interface — does not affect tasks or technical settings.
name_conflict_title: This technical name is already taken
name_conflict_hint: Choose another name. If the required DB already exists — open it in the database list.
name_importance_warning: It is highly recommended to use the exact technical name provided by the database author. This determines whether course tasks will properly link to this DB.
tip_technical_name:
The technical name is the database identifier in PostgreSQL.

⚠️ Critically Important:
The name directly affects whether course tasks will be linked! Task authors bind them to a specific DB name. Use the name specified by the database author.

Requirements:
• Only lowercase letters a–z, digits 0–9, and the _ symbol
• Starts with a letter
• Maximum 63 characters
• Must be unique — such database must not already exist

Examples: northwind, shop_db, my_catalog_2024
tip_display_name:
The display name is just a beautiful label for the interface.

It does not affect anything technically — only how the database is called in the list. You can leave it empty — then the technical name will be shown.
tip_sql_script:
The initialization SQL script is executed once immediately after the database is created.

What you can do:
• CREATE TABLE — create tables
• INSERT INTO — populate with data
• CREATE INDEX, CREATE VIEW, and other DDL
• Full pg_dump dump without CREATE DATABASE

What you SHOULD NOT include:
• CREATE DATABASE — the database is already created
• CREATE ROLE / DROP ROLE — permissions are managed by the system

The script can be empty — then an empty database will be created.
file_drop_hint: Drag and drop a .sql file here or click to choose
sql_empty_ok: Everything is fine — the script is optional. An empty database will be created.
sql_empty_warning: No SQL script provided. An empty database will be created.
summary_init_dump: A non-deletable initial snapshot (init dump) is created
